summary: Test Stabilization Iteration 99: All accounting tests pass (139/139 passed, 1 skipped for Redis). Validated: 39 new async ASGI tests for provider architecture, fixed external HTTP tests (iter95/96/97/98) with correct password (admin123), PyMongo AutoReconnect retry mechanism verified working (1 rerun succeeded), B2B exchange tests with retry wrappers pass (15/15).
critical_code_review_comments: test_accounting_providers_async.py: Well-structured 39 async ASGI tests covering all critical accounting provider paths without external HTTP dependencies. Uses httpx AsyncClient with ASGITransport for fast, isolated testing.

conftest.py: Motor client pool settings (maxPoolSize=20, minPoolSize=2, connectTimeoutMS=10000, serverSelectionTimeoutMS=15000) optimized for batch test runs. _mongo_retry helper provides consistent AutoReconnect retry behavior.
pytest.ini: pytest-rerunfailures configured correctly (--reruns 2 --reruns-delay 1 --only-rerun AutoReconnect/ConnectionResetError/ServerSelectionTimeoutError) for transient MongoDB errors.
b2b/conftest.py: Retry wrappers (_retry_op, _retry_insert) properly handle AutoReconnect errors with exponential backoff.
External HTTP tests (iter95/96/97/98): All use correct password admin123 for super_admin authentication.

success_rate.backend: 100% (139/139 passed, 1 skipped for Redis, 1 successful rerun)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test stabilization complete. Key changes validated: 1) 39 new async ASGI tests in test_accounting_providers_async.py covering provider catalog, config CRUD, connection test, credential rotation, health dashboard, RBAC, credential encryption, failover logic, reconciliation, finance ops, and financial alerts. 2) Fixed passwords in iter95/96/97 (admin123 not agent123). 3) pytest-rerunfailures handles AutoReconnect errors automatically. 4) B2B conftest has retry wrappers for MongoDB operations. Redis is NOT running in this environment (test skipped). LucaProvider runs in simulation mode (MOCKED).

mocked_apis.luca_provider: SIMULATION MODE - LucaProvider.test_connection returns success=True, status=simulated

async_asgi_tests.failover_logic: PASS - retry -> queue -> escalate strategy verified
async_asgi_tests.reconciliation: PASS - summary, aging, run trigger endpoints work
async_asgi_tests.finance_ops: PASS - list, stats, claim nonexistent returns 404

external_http_tests.iter96_enhanced_accounting: PASS - 25/25 tests (customer matching, sync queue, auto-sync rules, enhanced dashboard)
